ddls:
CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the customer */,
  "customer_type" TEXT /* Type of customer (e.g., Loyal, Disloyal) */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address for customer communication */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number for customer communication */,
  "frequent_flyer_number" TEXT /* Frequent flyer program number for loyalty tracking */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of residence for segmentation */,
  "language_preference" TEXT /* Preferred language for communication */,
  "travel_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of travel (e.g., Frequent, Occasional) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback record */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer providing the feedback */,
  "travel_type" TEXT /* Type of travel (e.g., Personal, Business) */,
  "class" TEXT /* Class of service (e.g., Eco Plus, Business) */,
  "flight_distance" INTEGER /* Distance of the flight in miles */,
  "flight_number" TEXT /* Flight number for specific flight identification */,
  "date_of_travel" TEXT /* Date of the travel experience */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Open-ended comments from the customer */,
  "rating_overall" INTEGER /* Overall rating for the travel experience (1-5) */,
  "rating_inflight_entertainment" INTEGER /* Rating for in-flight entertainment (1-5) */,
  "rating_cabin_service" INTEGER /* Rating for cabin service (1-5) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "service_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each service rating */,
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the feedback record this rating refers to */,
  "inflight_wifi" INTEGER /* Rating for inflight Wi-Fi service */,
  "food_drink" INTEGER /* Rating for food and drink service */,
  "seat_comfort" INTEGER /* Rating for seat comfort */,
  "rating_inflight_entertainment" INTEGER /* Rating for in-flight entertainment */,
  "rating_cabin_service" INTEGER /* Rating for cabin service */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_service_ratings_feedback_id FOREIGN KEY ("feedback_id") REFERENCES feedback ("feedback_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "overall_feedback" (
  "overall_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for overall feedback */,
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the feedback record this overall feedback refers to */,
  "cleanliness" INTEGER /* Rating for cleanliness */,
  "checkin_service" INTEGER /* Rating for check-in service */,
  "satisfaction" TEXT /* Overall satisfaction level of the customer */,
  "rating_overall" INTEGER /* Overall rating for the travel experience (1-5) */,
  "rating_inflight_entertainment" INTEGER /* Rating for in-flight entertainment (1-5) */,
  "rating_cabin_service" INTEGER /* Rating for cabin service (1-5) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("overall_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_overall_feedback_feedback_id FOREIGN KEY ("feedback_id") REFERENCES feedback ("feedback_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "delays" (
  "delay_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each delay record */,
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the feedback record this delay refers to */,
  "departure_delay" INTEGER /* Departure delay in minutes */,
  "arrival_delay" INTEGER /* Arrival delay in minutes */,
  "reason_for_delay" TEXT /* Reason for the delay (e.g., Weather, Technical Issues) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("delay_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_delays_feedback_id FOREIGN KEY ("feedback_id") REFERENCES feedback ("feedback_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "services" (
  "service_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each service */,
  "service_name" TEXT /* Name of the service offered (e.g., Food, Wi-Fi) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the service */,
  "service_category" TEXT /* Category of the service (e.g., Entertainment, Food) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("service_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, staff) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login timestamp for user activity tracking */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user (e.g., view, modify) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the action */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the system */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string for tracking the device and browser used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
